nasb.text: Then Balaam said to the donkey, “Because you have made a mockery of me! If there had been a sword in my hand, I would have killed you by now.”

esv.text: And Balaam said to the donkey, “Because you have made a fool of me. I wish I had a sword in my hand, for then I would kill you.”

cnv.text: 巴蘭對驢說：“因為你作弄我。但願我手中有刀，現在就把你殺死。”

ccb.text: 巴兰说：“因为你戏弄我。如果我手中有刀，早就把你宰了！”
